task_completion.description: The audit report correctly identifies the erroneous measurements.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal displaying the contents of measurement_audit_report.json shows 'trainee_aorta_diameter' and 'trainee_celiac_distance' in the 'erroneous_measurements' list.

task_completion.description: The audit report correctly identifies the correct measurements.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal displaying the contents of measurement_audit_report.json shows 'trainee_ivc_diameter' and 'trainee_renal_bifurcation' in the 'correct_measurements' list.

task_completion.description: The audit report includes descriptions of the errors and the corrected values.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The measurement_audit_report.json file contains populated 'errors' and 'corrected_values' fields with relevant text descriptions and numerical values.

task_completion.description: A corrected measurement for the aorta diameter is created in Slicer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 3D Slicer GUI shows a markup named 'corrected_aorta_diameter' (or similar starting with 'corrected_') in the Markups module list or visible in the 2D/3D views.

task_completion.description: A corrected measurement for the celiac distance is created in Slicer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 3D Slicer GUI shows a markup named 'corrected_celiac_distance' (or similar starting with 'corrected_') in the Markups module list or visible in the 2D/3D views.

task_completion.description: The corrected markups and audit report are saved to the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal, file explorer, or Slicer save dialog shows 'corrected_measurements.mrk.json' and 'measurement_audit_report.json' in the '~/Documents/SlicerData/AMOS/' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used 3D Slicer to load the CT scan and trainee measurements.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the 3D Slicer application open with the abdominal CT scan and markups loaded in the viewers.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Slicer GUI to create or adjust the corrected markups.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent using the Markups module or interacting with the control points in the 2D/3D views to place the corrected measurements.

integrity.description: The agent actually inspected the measurements before writing the report.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent viewing the specific slices where the trainee measurements are located to evaluate their correctness.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The erroneous measurements are 'trainee_aorta_diameter' and 'trainee_celiac_distance'. The correct measurements are 'trainee_ivc_diameter' and 'trainee_renal_bifurcation'. The audit report must classify these correctly. Corrected measurements must be created for the erroneous ones.
